options_presented.text: Focus on the technological leap of mRNA vaccines, detailing their biological mechanisms, rapid development cycle, and how they paved the way for the 2024-2025 variant-specific updates.

outputs_written.text: The deployment of COVID-19 mRNA vaccines has catalyzed a structural shift in biopharmaceutical development, characterized by an unprecedented convergence of rapid scalability and potent clinical efficacy [fact_662, fact_666]. Unlike traditional platforms, mRNA technology leverages the host's cellular machinery to translate encoded genetic sequences into target proteins [fact_664, fact_667], thereby driving a robust and versatile modulation of the immune system [fact_665].
